title: Migrate Windows Server workloads to Azure
summary: Learn to migrate physical and virtual on-premises Windows Server workloads to Azure.

sections.title: Migrate Windows Server workloads to Azure
sections.summary: Learn to migrate physical and virtual on-premises Windows Server workloads to Azure.

lessons.title: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying an Azure VMware Solution resource. Then, connect your VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Prepare to migrate VMware resources to Azure by deploying Azure VMware Solution

lessons.title: Migrate VMware vSphere resources from on-premises to Azure VMware Solution
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to migrate virtual machines from an on-premises VMware environment to Azure VMware Solution by using VMware HCX.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-vmware-workloads-on-premises-azure-vmware-solution/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate VMware vSphere resources from on-premises to Azure VMware Solution

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Migrate Windows Server workloads to Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Migrate Windows Server workloads to Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
